creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, Dec 14, 2009 at 09:52:17 +0100, Matthias Andree wrote:
> Greetings,
> 
> Approved if additionally MAINTAINER is set to mandree@FreeBSD.org. Please  
> make sure that all slave ports get a proper PORTREVISION (0) as well.
> 
> lwhsu, if you have tinderbox access and logs for FreeBSD 6, 7, 8, then  
> feel free to mail me the logs (I don't have a tinderbox access yet) and  
> reassign to mandree@.

Here are the tinderbox logs and refined patch. (Please note that this
new patch removes the patch file under files/, which makes this port
build.)

http://people.freebsd.org/~lwhsu/bogofilter-1.2.1-8.0.log
http://people.freebsd.org/~lwhsu/bogofilter-1.2.1-7.2.log
http://people.freebsd.org/~lwhsu/bogofilter-1.2.1-6.4.log

http://people.freebsd.org/~lwhsu/bogofilter.diff

Thanks!

-- 
Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu AT FreeBSD.org>
http://lwhsu.org
